# ENT-9108

Timeline fixture for the ADR-GOV-0012 D7 render filter. This community-class
entity must NOT appear on the default timeline — not on the axis, not in the
undated fallback lane, and not in the tradition count. It has an attestation
window and no coordinates; rendering it would mean inventing geometry the
evidence never carried.
